title: Very Many Players (Forge)
description: A Forge mod designed to improve server performance at high playercounts.
body:
# Very Many Players

A Forge mod designed to improve server performance at high playercounts. 

**VMP is still in early development and things are expected to break. Please report any issues to our issue tracker.**

## So what is VMP? 
Very Many Players, or VMP for short, is a mod designed to improve general server performance at high playercount 
**without sacrificing vanilla functionality or behavior**.  
For the best performance it is recommended to use VMP with Lithium.

## Support
Our issue tracker: [link](https://github.com/RelativityMC/VMP-forge/issues)  
Our discord server: [link](https://discord.gg/Kdy8NM5HW4)

## More information
Check out the README.md here: https://github.com/RelativityMC/VMP-forge
